ominous_signs: a red star visible at noon
disturbing_sights: a tree hung with sleeping masks
hoofprints filling slowly with black wax
forbidden_magic_effects: time repeats until blood is shed
dark_prophecies: The town will drown beneath a cloudless sky
The kindest hand will open the final door
No crowned head will leave the cave alive
The bell will ring once for every broken oath
strange_weather: Rain falls upward around ancient stones
A narrow band of night crosses the land at noon
Warm snow carries tiny black seeds
Lightning remains frozen in the sky for hours
eerie_sounds: A child humming behind the stone
Distant armor marching out of rhythm
A bell heard only when nobody speaks
supernatural_marks: Every doorway bears a different eye carved overnight
The settlement casts no shadow at sunset
Blue moths gather around anyone planning violence
Old scars ache when the northern bell rings
